scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend2.1 && npm install --prefix backend2.1 && npm install --prefix electron2.1
scripts.start: npm run build-ui && npm run build-backend && cd electron2.1 && npm start
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build-ui && npm run build-backend && npm run build:linux --prefix electron2.1
scripts.dist:win: npm run build-ui && npm run build-backend && npm run build:win --prefix electron2.1
